plainEnglish: At Level AAA, help users understand where they are within a site—through breadcrumbs, a highlighted current item in the navigation, or a sitemap. Orientation cues prevent people from getting lost in a large site.
whyItMatters: Users with cognitive disabilities easily get lost in a large site without orientation cues like breadcrumbs or a marked current page.
quickCheck: Confirm the current page is indicated—via breadcrumbs, an aria-current marker in the nav, or a sitemap.
commonMistakes: No breadcrumbs or current-page indicator in deep site hierarchies.
Not marking the active nav item with aria-current="page".
Breadcrumbs that don't reflect the actual page hierarchy.

codeExamples.label: Breadcrumb with the current page marked
No location cue anywhere
codeExamples.code:
{/* No breadcrumb or current-page marker */}
